title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr Matthew Edison
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Mr Matthew Edison  Teacher reference number: 3742453  Teacher’s date of birth: 21 May 1989  Location teacher worked: Suffolk, East of England  Date of professional conduct panel: 14 February 2025  Outcome type: prohibition order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of  Mr Matthew Edison, formerly employed in Suffolk, East of England. "
